_comment_: Sample devcontainer.json for use with a running devbox instance.
Drop this at .devcontainer/devcontainer.json in your repo, then either:
- VSCode: F1 → 'Dev Containers: Attach to Running Container' → devbox-<owner>-<repo>
name: devbox attach
postCreateCommand: echo 'devbox attach ready — /work is your repo, /nix is the shared store volume'
